subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant and steadfast in the Testament! Though outwardly thou art distant and remote, yet in reality thou art present in the gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و راسخ بر میثاق اگر چه بظاهر دوری و مهجوری ولی بحقیقت در محفل
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
